title: Architecture (State 011 Tilt Local Dev on Kubernetes)
description: State 011 preserves state 010 Kubernetes runtime while introducing Tilt for local developer automation.

nodes.label: Developer
nodes.description: Iterates locally with fast feedback loops.

nodes.label: Kubernetes Cluster
nodes.description: Underlying runtime substrate inherited from state 010.

nodes.label: TraderX Workloads
nodes.description: Core services remain functionally equivalent to state 010.

notes: State 011 is the publish-lineage parent of state 012; state 013 branches from state 012.
Primary delta is developer workflow/tooling, not platform abstraction.
